name: Appmixer Account
description: An Account represents an authenticated connection to a third-party service (e.g. OAuth credentials for Slack, Google, etc.) belonging to an Appmixer user.

accountId.description: Unique identifier for the connected account.

name.description: Display name for the connected account.

service.description: The service or connector this account is associated with (e.g. appmixer.google).

profileInfo.description: Profile information retrieved from the third-party service.

valid.description: Whether the account credentials (tokens) are still valid.
